title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: mdadm bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for mdadm is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 Release Notes linked from the References section.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64

fixes.description: [rhel9.7] mdadm: bogus takeover message raid10 -> raid0
[rhel9.7] mdadm: array name with ":" can't be assemble when specifying --name
[rhel9.7] Allow RAID0 to be created with v0.90 metadata
[rhel9.7] mdadm: bitmap file is not supported
[rhel9.7] mdadm: Grow command fails when updating chunk size

full_text:
An update for mdadm is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 Release Notes linked from the References section.
